meta_title: For Students: Antigravity project template to Solve can't debug code (Advanced Idea List)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome can't debug code. A Advanced-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: Antigravity Template to Fix Debugging Issues
content.seo_description: Master complex debugging with the Antigravity project template. A high-level guide for students to ship production-grade code using Claude Code.
content.answer_block: Stop staring at stack traces. The Antigravity project template enforces strict architectural boundaries, preventing common logic errors before they manifest. By integrating Claude Code, you transform your debugging workflow from manual trial-and-error into an automated, AI-driven diagnostic process that identifies root causes in seconds, not hours.
content.intro:
The cursor blinks in the silence of a late-night coding session. You are staring at a recursive error that defies logic, feeling the familiar weight of 'can't debug code' syndrome—the invisible wall between a student project and a professional-grade application. Every failed refactor feels like a step backward, eroding the confidence you need to ship.

But the best engineers don't debug harder; they build better environments. By adopting the Antigravity project template, you move your development workflow into a hardened sandbox where code structure dictates stability. This isn't just about fixing a bug; it's about re-engineering your entire approach to software construction using AI-assisted diagnostic power.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish a robust foundation by cloning the Antigravity template, which enforces modularity and prevents 'spaghetti code' that makes debugging impossible.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project scaffold using the Antigravity pattern, ensuring strict separation between state management and business logic.

steps.title: Map the Dependency Graph
steps.description: Visualize your data flow. Debugging is often just tracking state mutation; we use Claude Code to map these interactions.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current project dependencies and generate a Mermaid diagram of the state flow.

steps.title: Implement Automated Diagnostic Hooks
steps.description: Inject logging hooks that capture state snapshots when exceptions trigger, providing a replayable history of the failure.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Insert Antigravity diagnostic hooks into all asynchronous functions to capture state before failure.

steps.title: Isolate the Failure Point
steps.description: Use Claude Code to execute targeted tests on the isolated module, stripping away the app's complexity to find the logic flaw.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Identify the failing module and create a minimal reproduction test case.

steps.title: Auto-Refactor via Pattern Matching
steps.description: Once the root cause is confirmed, use the template's auto-refactor capability to apply a clean, tested fix.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Apply a permanent fix to the identified bug using the Antigravity structural pattern.

pro_tips: Treat your error logs as data sets, not noise; feed them into Claude Code to identify recurring patterns in your logic mistakes.
Always enforce 'immutability by default' in your Antigravity config to eliminate side-effect bugs.
Use Claude Code's 'review' mode on your own code before committing; treat the AI as your senior lead.
If a bug persists, delete the module and re-generate it using the Antigravity template to see if the structure was the actual problem.
Document your 'aha!' moments in a dedicated repo; debugging is a skill of recognizing past patterns, not raw intelligence.
resources: Debugging Best Practices for Students: https://github.com/student-dev-guide
content.next_steps: Once your first module is bug-free, integrate a CI/CD pipeline to automate your Antigravity testing suite on every push.
content.conversion_block: Stop fighting your code and start commanding it. With the right template and the right tools, you aren't just a student—you are a developer building the future. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
